{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/heads/master/assets/cubyz/items/textures/cloth/white.png
|block_health=2
|tool=[[Sickle]]
|rotation=carpet
}}

Cloth is a colored block with carpet rotation.

== Obtaining ==
Cloth is only found in rare biomes, with the modern art biome being the most reliable way to get all the colors.

== Usage ==
Cloth can be placed on all sides of a block, and multiple pieces of cloth can be placed within one block.

4 cloth can be used to craft cloth blocks.

== History ==
* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

[[Category:Colored Blocks]]
[[Category:Blocks]]
